📊 Business Notifications
WhatsApp Order Management: Reply to order notifications with "ACCEPT [order_id]" or "REJECT [order_id] [reason]" to manage orders directly from WhatsApp!
Note: Critical business notifications (like new orders and payments) are highly recommended to keep enabled for optimal business operations.
